titleStmt.title: SII 27.180: original edition by M. D. Sampath, H. K. Narasimhamurthy, Madhav N. Katti and B. R. Gopal
No. 180. (A.R. No. 487 of 1928-29.) UPPŪRU, UDIPI TALUK, SOUTH KANARA DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up in the prākāra off the Vināyaka temple.

This record is dated Śaka 1477 (expired), (1478 current), Manmatha, Phālguṇa śu. 5. The cyclic year Manmatha corresponds to Śaka 1457. The details of date, which are not verifiable, correspond to 1536 A.D., February 5.

The record seems to refer to a concession shown in the tax due to the king from the village Uppūru by Koṇḍappoḍeya who was administering Bārakūru-rājya under the orders of Suṅkaṇa-nāyaka who was governing Bārakūru-Maṅgaḷūru-rājya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrī gaṇādhipatayē namaḥ namastuṁga śiraścuṁbi ca
ṁdra cāmara cāravē . trailōkya nagarāraṁbha mūlastaṁbhā
ya śaṁbhavē . svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavaru
ṣa 1477 saṁdu yeṁṭaneya vartamāna manmatha saṁva
tsarada phālguṇa śudha 5 lu śrīmanmahā rājādhirāja rāja
paramēśvara śrī vīrapratāpa śrīvīra Accutarāya mahā
rāyaru vijayanagariya siṁhāsanadalli cittayisi saka
la varṁnadharṁmāśramaṁgaḷanū vicārisuva kālada
lu Ārāyara nirūpadiṁda bārakūru maṁgalūra
rājyavanu suṁkaṇanāyakarige pālisi Ā nāyakara ni
rūpadiṁda koḍappoḍeyaru bārakūra rājyavanu
pratipālisuva kāladalli Uppūragrāmadamēle koṁ
ḍappoḍeyaru rājakāryyavamāḍuvāga heṁṇina nirige
gaṁḍina talege tappidakke Arasige Ardharājyakke paṁthaye
ṁba vivarakke Aramaneya bhaṁḍārastaḷa Uppūragrāma
U teruva kuḷāgrada hoṁninoḷage niṁma padāṁti
kakke niṁma grāmada Oḷage yeṁbhattumuḍi kuḷāgra Āda .
roḷage nālkumuḍi kuḷāgravanu Āṁṇakekuḍeyara ma
ga śivakekuḍeyarige koṭṭeU mikka yeppattāṟa muḍi ku
ḷāgravanu Uttāravamāḍikoṁḍu mēlāda kuḷāgrada
(kuḷāgrada) muḍi Uppūra nālku catusīmeyoḷage mu
ḍināṁnūru nāṁnūru muḍiyoḷage caṁni ga
ḷige Uṇṭāda Uttāravanu tegadukoṁḍu da ho
ṁnanu Aramanegetettu bāḷuviriyeṁdu barasiko
ṭa paṭṭeya paṭṭiyalli barada yeṁbhattu muḍi kuḷāgrava
nu Ā caṁdrārkavāgi niṁma grāmau bāḷuviriyeṁdu
koṁḍappoḍeyaru barasikoṭa paṭṭi karaṇika tiṁmarasara
baraha . dānapālanayōrmadhyē dānātśrēyōnupālanaṁ .
dānāt svarggamavāpnōti pālanādacyutaṁ padaṁ . śrī
Digital edition of SII 27.180 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
